notes: The amount column in the source Google Sheet was changed from pure numeric to text values including currency suffixes (e.g. '1500 USD'). Fivetran re-inferred the column type as STRING on next sync. The downstream dbt transformation invoices_amounts now fails — CAST(amount AS FLOAT64) throws a Bad double value error on the text values.

signals.error_message: Database Error in model invoices_amounts — Bad double value: CAST(amount AS FLOAT64) fails after column re-inferred as STRING
